name: example-admin-neobrutal
title: Neobrutalist Admin
description: A neo-brutalist admin dashboard — thick black borders, hard 4px offset shadows, vibrant pastel blocks (coral / lime / cream), monospaced numerics. Use when the brief asks for an admin with personality: 'brutalist admin', 'pastel dashboard', 'bold borders', 'flat blocks'.

query.en: Build me a neo-brutalist admin panel for a creative studio — bold black borders, pastel blocks, sidebar, stat tiles, project table, recent activity.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a neo-brutalist admin panel for a creative studio — bold black borders, pastel blocks, sidebar, stat tiles, project table, recent activity.
